ThumbRingDiameter

The thumb's VISUAL diameter: the 18px Thumb part (SliderHorizontalThumbWidth/Height, lines 169-170) + the template Border's Margin="-2" (line 198) ⇒ a 22px ring on screen.

public float ThumbRingDiameter { get; init; }

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
